questions.text: How do agents retrieve episodic memories from long-term storage?
options: By performing a vector similarity search on the active query against the memory database.
By reloading the base model weights.
questions.correct_answer: By performing a vector similarity search on the active query against the memory database.
questions.explanation: Episodic memories are retrieved by converting the active query to an embedding and searching a vector database for similar past observations.
